rawMetadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.30+commit.73712a01"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[],"devdoc":{"details":"V4 Architecture Key Points:      - PoolManager is a singleton - pool state is read via extsload      - Pools are identified by PoolKey (currency0, currency1, fee, tickSpacing, hooks)      - Uses StateLibrary to read pool state without requiring unlock      - Mirrors the Pool.swap loop, but only reads pool stateDynamic Fee Pools: Pools can set the FEE_DYNAMIC flag (0x800000 in the fee field) to indicate      that hooks may override the LP fee during beforeSwap(). Since this library reads state without      executing hooks, the quoted fee may not match the actual fee charged at execution time.This library provides equivalent functionality to UniswapV3Quoter, adapted for V4's PoolManager architecture","kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"UniswapV4Quoter","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"View-based Uniswap V4 swap quoting that can cross initialized ticks. IMPORTANT: For pools         with dynamic fees (FEE_DYNAMIC flag = 0x800000), quotes may differ from actual swap results         because hooks can modify fees at execution time. Use quotes from dynamic-fee pools as         estimates only.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/protocols/dexes/uniswap/v4/utils/UniswapV4Quoter.sol":"UniswapV4Quoter"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":1},"remappings":[":@crane/contracts/=contracts/",":@crane/test/=test/",":@openzeppelin/contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/",":halmos-cheatcodes/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/halmos-cheatcodes/src/",":hardhat/=node_modules/hardhat/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/",":solady/=lib/solady/src/"]},"sources":{"contracts/protocols/dexes/uniswap/v4/interfaces/IExtsload.sol":{"keccak256":"0x1b5c281b570f9065a06c5a964323296a2f75d687169704aa31d9ea9a8462b02c","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://8434d3153739ec3143257b68616cd1ed200a94b7e3b50fdb0d78faecce0e127b","dweb:/ipfs/QmNq5YbYHeM2AWGiScTprNQQK2Lzm1PXcsP1dxv5zTT5yz"]},"contracts/protocols/dexes/uniswap/v4/interfaces/IExttload.sol":{"keccak256":"0xd6116e68e139419836f1d965a43f8b5df6084ae24a3de24efe2c6d4b4b623c41","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://ae2a77335b35f9602d0685536ffdbec770a7d1705cd2e0ebffe1297a966167c9","dweb:/ipfs/QmNSUz988Hz1bAmGTLuypTWEctGbjTU6ig8DVjbE8nGXAv"]},"contracts/protocols/dexes/uniswap/v4/interfaces/IHooks.sol":{"keccak256":"0x8405eee48ad83fbcc74fc312ffb57c804995876311bb3a5eafc8a0aff36a294c","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://c139714afd1ba499df9919c4a687ee650927d02092518849f5cdd1a6e5a10df2","dweb:/ipfs/QmXPj7dePGC9dNpRyrHTCriRE7if8pAQa6JqUzira8yRhY"]},"contracts/protocols/dexes/uniswap/v4/interfaces/IPoolManager.sol":{"keccak256":"0xea3e0e354e70ef91842ec5663500e5e48be790141be5373dae56e2115ae14db8","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://79e10044f5d50aeb9d55abe755935c7d1c8578eebfaca0863afee5fd29e0fd6e","dweb:/ipfs/QmPSaHv3PXD2NFgiqod82iafNxen49yUioyj8ihgfAS5sP"]},"contracts/protocols/dexes/uniswap/v4/interfaces/IProtocolFees.sol":{"keccak256"
